text: The implementation of shortest_paths is incorrect because it tries to update edge weights instead of node distances, leading to all node distances except the source remaining infinite. The Bellman-Ford algorithm should update the distance (weight) for each node by relaxing edges, but here weight_by_edge is mutated incorrectly and weight_by_node is never updated properly. Consequently, the tests fail because the expected minimum distances are not computed.

data.label: shortest_paths function implementation incorrectly updates edge weights instead of node distances.
This incorrect implementation causes all node distances except source to remain infinite.
Tests fail because output differs from expected minimum path weights for nodes.
